title: SwarmRunManifest
description: Manifest for a Swarm Sandbox execution. Non-authoritative provenance artifact.

swarm_run_id.description: Unique identifier for this Swarm execution (e.g., SWARM-2026-01-25-abc123).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when Swarm run was initiated.

inputs_digest.description: SHA256 hash of canonical user inputs for reproducibility.

swarm_config_digest.description: SHA256 hash of Swarm configuration (worker definitions, constraints).

path.description: Relative path to the artifact within swarm_artifacts/.

eligible_outputs.description: List of artifacts eligible for Intake handoff.

toolchain_versions.description: Optional: versions of tools used (e.g., python, node, swarm_controller).

metadata.description: Optional non-sovereign metadata for audit trail.
